ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange (e.g., America/New_York) */,
  "trading_hours_start" TEXT /* Start time of trading hours */,
  "trading_hours_end" TEXT /* End time of trading hours */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which stock prices are denominated (e.g., USD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., JDAS) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company issuing the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company (e.g., Technology) */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering (IPO) date */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the stock information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock associated with the price record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock for the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock for the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of stocks traded */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "pre_market_open" REAL /* Pre-market opening price */,
  "after_hours_close" REAL /* After-hours closing price */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., Yahoo Finance, Bloomberg) */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the data (1-10, with 10 being the highest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being analyzed */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the analysis report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Trend Analysis, Volatility Analysis) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the report was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_analysis_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_analysis_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock associated with the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric calculation */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price compared to the previous day */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the stock price over a period */,
  "moving_average_50" REAL /* 50-day moving average */,
  "moving_average_200" REAL /* 200-day moving average */,
  "rsi" REAL /* Relative Strength Index (RSI) */,
  "macd" REAL /* Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) */,
  "bollinger_bands_upper" REAL /* Upper Bollinger Band */,
  "bollinger_bands_lower" REAL /* Lower Bollinger Band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_metrics_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "total_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume traded during the session */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume traded during the session */,
  "trading_value" TEXT /* Total value of trades during the session */,
  "number_of_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed during the session */,
  "average_trade_size" INTEGER /* Average size of each trade */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., Regular, Extended Hours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
